# current-prod — reference snapshots

HTML snapshots of surfaces as they currently ship. Not aspirational.

Add a new snapshot by:

1. Taking a visual recording of the live Mini App surface.
2. Rebuilding it as a self-contained HTML file (inline CSS, no JS
   dependencies) or a screenshot `.png` if a faithful HTML is impractical.
3. Adding a row to [`../README.md`](../README.md) with the surface name and
   date captured.

**Do not edit files here to fix bugs.** Fix the code, then recapture.

Empty at Phase-1 rollout — snapshots will be added as surfaces enter
formal migration in Phase 2.
